title: Cuts to US ocean programme will hinder monitoring of El Niño and AMOC
description: Scientists warn that the Trump administration's push to dismantle a vital network of ocean sensing instruments will stymie crucial weather and climate monitoring in the Pacific and Atlantic
author: Alec Luhn

title: Flood of AI 'garbage' is pushing open-source developers to the limit
description: The modern world depends on open-source software maintained by volunteers, but the added demands of checking and fixing AI-written submissions are causing some to burn out and quit
author: Matthew Sparkes

title: A chromosome from a frozen rat has been resurrected inside mice
description: Mice that contain cells with an added rat chromosome have been created by scientists. The next step is to try this with frozen elephant tissue – and if that works, the team will try it with frozen mammoths
author: Michael Le Page

title: Becoming a parent may make you love your partner less
description: Parents report loving their partners less within the first year of having a child, but that doesn't mean the feeling is permanent or inevitable
author: Carissa Wong

title: Mysterious ‘cold blob’ in the Atlantic suggests the AMOC is weakening
description: A patch of ocean south-east of Greenland is the only place on Earth that is cooling, and it could be a sign that the warm water "conveyor belt" in the Atlantic is slowing down
author: Alec Luhn

title: Stonehenge's altar stone probably wasn't transported by a glacier
description: A glacier could have carried the giant sandstone at the centre of Stonehenge southwards from north-east Scotland, but this scenario appears unlikely
author: James Woodford
